sections.title: Eighths
sections.prompt:
Generate five pages of eighth notes, notes only, no accents or flams or anything. Use this json to know how the json is structured. Random exercises.

Prefer quarter rests over two eighth note rests in a row.
Prefer a quarter note over an eighth note followed by an eighth rest.

sections.title: Eighths with Accents
sections.prompt:
Generate five pages of eighth notes with random accents. Use this json to know how the json is structured. Random exercises.

Prefer quarter rests over two eighth note rests in a row.
Prefer a quarter note over an eighth note followed by an eighth rest.

sections.title: Eighths with flams
sections.prompt:

Prefer quarter rests over two eighth note rests in a row.
Prefer a quarter note over an eighth note followed by an eighth rest.

sections.title: Eights with Flams and Accents
sections.prompt:

Prefer a quarter note over an eighth note followed by an eighth rest.
